name: magic-favicon
description: Transform favicons into dynamic progress bars, status indicators, and notification badges.
author: magic-favicon contributors

scripts.size: npm run build >/dev/null && gzip -c dist/index.js | wc -c | tr -d ' '
scripts.size:check: SIZE=$(npm run -s size); if [ "$SIZE" -gt 5120 ]; then echo "Size budget exceeded: $SIZE bytes"; exit 1; else echo "Gzip size: $SIZE bytes"; fi
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run test && npm run size:check
